Description.English:
A supercooled chemical extract, typically found in large deposits or extracted from smaller mineral formations after inspection with an Analysis Visor.

Extracted from deposits formed in the hostile conditions of gas giants.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一种处于超低温状态下的化学元素，常见于大型资源点，或者也可以通过分析面甲查看小型矿物点进行提取。

能够从在气态巨星的恶劣环境下形成的资源点中采集。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
極低溫化學萃取物，常見於大型資源產地，也可用分析護目鏡探測小型礦物岩層採集。

可在氣態巨行星惡劣條件下形成的資源產地中採集。

PinObjectiveTip.English:
Crystallized Helium is a supercooled chemical extract, typically found in large deposits or extracted from smaller mineral formations after inspection with an Analysis Visor.

Extracted from deposits formed in the hostile conditions of gas giants.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese:
氦晶体是一种处于超低温状态下的化学元素，常见于大型资源点，或者也可以通过分析面甲查看小型矿物点进行提取。

能够从在气态巨星的恶劣环境下形成的资源点中采集。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese:
結晶氦是極低溫化學萃取物，常見於大型資源產地，也可用分析護目鏡探測小型礦物岩層採集。

可在氣態巨行星惡劣條件下形成的資源產地中採集。

PinObjectiveMessage.English:
Use the Analysis Visor to locate Crystallized Helium deposits
Crystallized Helium is found on gas giants
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese:
使用分析面甲定位氦晶体资源点
能够在气态巨星上找到氦晶体
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese:
使用分析護目鏡找到結晶氦資源產地
結晶氦可見於氣態巨行星
